title: Like Mighty Footlights Burned The Red
content:
Like mighty footlights burned the red
    At bases of the trees, --
    The far theatricals of day
    Exhibiting to these.

    'T was universe that did applaud
    While, chiefest of the crowd,
    Enabled by his royal dress,
    Myself distinguished God.
meaning:
"Like Mighty Footlights Burned The Red" is a quintessential example of Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
